prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: full-body shot of a young man with extremely handsome appearance, standing in the center of a pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words. He has silver-white short hair and deep, intelligent eyes with a gentle gaze. His skin is fair, and his expression is calm and focused, exuding a natural elegance and high charm. He wears a deep blue programmer's robe that fits his slender, athletic build. The robe has a high-tech, flowing texture with subtle circuit-like patterns woven into the fabric. On his chest, a luminous code insignia glows with a soft blue light. He wears a data bracelet on his wrist, and faint blue light often flickers at his fingertips. He carries a sleek fiber-optic backpack on his back and wears levitating boots. The overall style is cyberpunk with a strong sense of future technology, featuring neon light effects and high contrast. The atmosphere is beautiful and ethereal, blending the elegance of code with the wonder of a fantasy world., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: cyberpunk
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
